_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Another fix for finding Python on cmake>=3.12

The variables set by FindPythonX all begin with PythonX_.

data.author: LorenzMeier
data.message:
Merge pull request #8 from amilcarlucas/pr_update_url

data.author: sloretz
data.message:
Fail if user calls find_package() with wrong case

Generated include directories are correct only if user calls
find_package() with lowercase `mavlink`. This commit makes the config
file fail if the user uses a different case.

data.author: guludo
data.message:
Fix @PKG_NAME@_INCLUDE_DIR variable

The previous approach hardcoded the path to the include directory and cross
compilation using a sysroot directory would fail. This patch takes the
resulting config files generated from other ROS packages as reference.
